capabilities.title: Client Portal
capabilities.description: A private, real-time workspace for project collaboration, comments, and progress tracking.

capabilities.title: AI Film Production
capabilities.description: AI-powered production for individual films and an ongoing monthly film series, creating a growing content library faster and at lower cost than traditional methods.

capabilities.title: AI Roadmap
capabilities.description: Research-backed guidance on where and how to add AI to your operations, with clear value and effort assessment.

capabilities.title: Brand Knowledge Library
capabilities.description: An organized, searchable library of your brand, products, features, and communication guidelines.

capabilities.title: AI Workflow Training
capabilities.description: Teaching your team to use AI-powered workflows for everyday tasks — writing, analysis, research, and reporting.

narrative.summary: Third i is building Film 1 alongside a private client portal, AI roadmap, and brand knowledge library. The production system carries forward reusable methods and quality checks from prior work while every client's files, prompts, knowledge, and generated assets remain isolated.
narrative.faster: Each completed bkWatch film will establish a verified baseline for total hours, weeks to completion, and hours per finished minute. After two completed projects, this page will compare expected and actual efficiency and show how both improve over time.
narrative.smarter: Reusable production methods and quality-control patterns improve with completed work, but no other client's source files, prompts, private knowledge, credentials, or generated assets enter bkWatch's workspace. bkWatch work is guided by bkWatch's approved materials and feedback.
narrative.expanding: Every future project adds a clearer record of delivery speed, approved quality, deliverable volume, financial context, and reusable capabilities. The placeholders below become verified metrics as work is completed.

learningPrivacy.title: Built on prior work. Isolated by client.
learningPrivacy.description: Third i improves reusable production methods through completed work without pooling client workspaces. General craft and quality-control improvements carry forward; client-specific material never crosses into another client's portal or production package.
carriesForward: General film craft and quality-control patterns
Workflow improvements that reduce avoidable setup and rework
staysPrivate: Client source files and generated assets
Prompts, credentials, and private brand knowledge
Client-specific feedback, strategy, and project records

futureValueSections.title: Delivery speed
futureValueSections.description: Shows whether production becomes faster across completed projects.

futureValueSections.title: Deliverable quality
futureValueSections.description: Uses approval evidence instead of an invented quality score.

futureValueSections.title: Output volume
futureValueSections.description: Records how much finished, client-approved work each project produces.

futureValueSections.title: Financial return
futureValueSections.description: Adds comparable financial context after project scope and billing are confirmed.

futureValueSections.title: Compounding capability
futureValueSections.description: Shows the reusable systems and client-specific capabilities added by each project.

futureValueSections.title: Project confidence
futureValueSections.description: Compares plans with completed results without exposing another client's records.

financialSummary.note: bkWatch is in the pipeline phase — no invoices yet. 20 hours are recorded on Film 1 production.

source: Hours from Third i time tracking (20 hrs recorded manually); project efficiency activates only from tenant-owned completed work

aiImplementation.title: AI Implementation
aiImplementation.description: Everything Third i can build and run inside bkWatch's daily operations — AI in daily use, training, full-service production across film, web, marketing, and automation, plus consulting and ongoing creative support. These are the services designed to be worked into the partnership over time for compounding value.

subcategories.title: Daily Use
subcategories.description: AI worked directly into everyday operations — the fastest path to measurable time savings.

items.title: Communication Workflows
items.description: AI-assisted drafting, summarizing, and triage for email, support, and internal comms — faster responses with a consistent brand voice.

items.title: GenAI Workflows
items.description: Repeatable generative-AI workflows for writing, research, and content creation, tailored to bkWatch's product and audience.

items.title: AI Automations
items.description: Automating routine tasks — data entry, document processing, scheduling, and report generation — so the team focuses on higher-value work.

items.title: Document Automation
items.description: AI-generated and auto-filled documents — proposals, reports, and internal documentation from your templates and data.

items.title: Data Analysis & Reporting
items.description: Automated analysis of business data with scheduled reports, dashboards, and plain-English insights.

items.title: Customer Support AI
items.description: AI chatbots and response suggestions that speed up support while keeping answers accurate and on-brand.

subcategories.title: AI-use Training
subcategories.description: Hands-on training for every AI service Third i offers, so the team can run and extend the tools themselves.

items.title: AI Daily Use Training
items.description: Practical training for the whole team on using AI for everyday tasks — writing, analysis, research, and reporting.

items.title: Agentic Workflow Training
items.description: Teaching the team to build and run autonomous AI workflows for their own recurring work.

items.title: Tool-Specific Training
items.description: Focused sessions on the specific AI tools bkWatch adopts — prompts, best practices, and shortcuts.

items.title: Team AI Onboarding
items.description: A structured program to bring new and existing team members up to speed on the AI stack.

items.title: AI Best Practices & Governance
items.description: Guidance on safe, accurate, and compliant AI use — review processes, data handling, and quality control.
